title: Task status field
description: Add a status field to the Task model (not_started, in_progress, complete, blocked). Without this the agent can never record completion and will keep reminding owners indefinitely.

title: Update task status tool
description: Give the agent a tool to mark tasks as complete, in_progress, or blocked. When an inbox message confirms completion the agent should update the task, not just note it in the journal.

title: Overdue task detection
description: Detect tasks whose due_date has passed without completion. These should trigger escalation behaviour rather than a standard reminder.

title: Per-task outbox tracking
description: Tag each outbox message with a task_id so the chaser frequency check is per-task rather than per-person. Bob has two tasks — last-message-sent-to-Bob is too coarse.

title: Task dependency model
description: Add a depends_on field to Task. The agent should not chase an owner for a task whose dependency is incomplete, and should flag blocked tasks in the journal.

title: Priority field on tasks
description: Add a priority field (high, medium, low) to the Task model so the agent can triage, escalate high-priority overdue tasks sooner, and tailor message tone.

title: Advance warning reminders
description: Remind owners 1-2 days before a task is due, not just on the day. Warning lead time should be configurable.

title: Escalation logic
description: If a task is N days overdue with no completion or response, send an escalation message to a separate recipient (e.g. a manager). N should be configurable.

title: Inbox intent parsing
description: Extract structured intent from inbox messages: completion confirmation, blocker report, date change request, etc. Drive smarter decisions rather than treating all replies as raw text.

title: Weekly summary report
description: Generate a weekly markdown summary across the week's journals: tasks completed, overdue, at risk. Write to data/reports/YYYY-Www.md.

title: Status snapshot file
description: Write a data/status.json on each run with a current snapshot of all task states so external tools and dashboards can consume it without parsing journals.

title: Config file for thresholds
description: Move hardcoded values (chaser frequency, advance warning days, escalation threshold) into a data/config.json file so behaviour can be tuned without editing code.

title: Idempotency guard
description: Prevent double-sends and duplicate journal entries if the agent runs more than once in a day (e.g. after a crash and restart). Check whether today's loop has already completed before acting.
